query: SELECT mesano, CONCAT('20', RIGHT(LPAD(CAST(mesano AS CHAR),6,'0'),2), LPAD(LEFT(LPAD(CAST(mesano AS CHAR),6,'0'), LENGTH(CAST(mesano AS CHAR))-2),2,'0')) as aaaamm FROM febraban WHERE empresa='FLEX' GROUP BY mesano ORDER BY aaaamm DESC LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user axRHbWZqKReZrAb.b2cf85c9ad94 --database SMgJn6AGQCNfDq7mPzPqc9 --execute SELECT mesano, CONCAT('20', RIGHT(LPAD(CAST(mesano AS CHAR),6,'0'),2), LPAD(LEFT(LPAD(CAST(mesano AS CHAR),6,'0'), LENGTH(CAST(mesano AS CHAR))-2),2,'0')) as aaaamm FROM febraban WHERE empresa='FLEX' GROUP BY mesano ORDER BY aaaamm DESC LIMIT 5;
